summary_one_line: ICC profile device-class FOURCC at offsets 0x0c-0x0f must be a class (link/prtr) yielding an empty-Elements LUT pair, not mntr.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte ICC profile device-class signature at offsets 0x0c-0x0f must spell a class that drives DefaultICCintents down a path producing a pipeline with l1->Elements==NULL and l2->Elements==NULL at cmsPipelineCat (e.g. 'link' = 0x6c 0x69 0x6e 0x6b, or 'prtr'), rather than the monitor class 'mntr' that all loser seeds carry.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All five winner-resolving seeds carry a non-monitor device class at 0x0c-0x0f: 'link' (6c 69 6e 6b) and 'prtr' (70 72 74 72); the BYTE DIFF shows W bytes 70(p)/6c(l) and 72(r)/69(i) at 0x0c-0x0d versus L's constant 6d(m)/6e(n), confirming W explores classes that reach the empty-LUT true branch (hit_div=57, T-side taken).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Every loser-blocking seed has 'mntr' (6d 6e 74 72) at 0x0c-0x0f; at 0x0c the L set is 6d(m)x10 and at 0x0d it is 6e(n)x10 with zero variation, so the loser never reaches a class whose pipeline has NULL Elements, leaving the true side blocked (L1609 T=0 F=30).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog's I2SRandReplace splices the cmplog-logged 4-byte device-class comparand into the input bytes at the offset where it appears, flipping 'mntr' to a class signature (e.g. 'link'/'prtr') that the parser compares against; plain value_profile has only CMP_MAP distance feedback and havoc, with no I2SRandReplace mutator to perform the exact 4-byte substitution.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is the true side of an equality test requiring both pipelines to have NULL Elements inside cmsPipelineCat.
Winner seeds carry the device-class signatures 'link' and 'prtr' at the offset-0x0c FOURCC field.
A winner seed carries 'prtr' at the device-class field.
All loser seeds carry the monitor class 'mntr' at the same FOURCC field.
The byte sets at 0x0c-0x0d differ between W (p/l, r/i) and a constant L (m, n), marking this FOURCC as the dataflow-divergent field.
The loser never takes the blocker true side while the winner does (hit divergence on the branch).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L1609  T=14 F=21  T=0 F=30  if (l1 ->Elements == NULL && l2 ->Elements == NULL) {  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile has no I2SRandReplace mutator, only CMP_MAP distance feedback and havoc.
value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of the havoc/token stack.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 2208 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 1a518b8c45d1aba2` and observed one I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 10 of the 11-level ancestor chain; the tool reported 'I2S-floor signal: 1 ancestor dash row(s) at depth 10', a lower-bound signal of an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in the vpc lineage.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating the true branch on a 4-byte device-class signature in which value_profile (no I2S) resolves the branch at the same rate as value_profile_cmplog, showing the exact 4-byte substitution is not what enables the winner.

weakest_evidence_point: The causal claim that 'mntr' specifically yields non-NULL Elements while 'link'/'prtr' yield NULL Elements is inferred from the seed/byte pattern and parser path, not from direct source of the class-to-pipeline mapping in the prompt.
